name: Solid Drama Jumpsuit
description: Full-length wide-leg jumpsuit in heavyweight cotton blend. Cut for XS–5XL with a flared silhouette and deep V-neck. This is the statement piece the drop is named after.

name: Boho Co-ord Set
description: Matching crop top and wide-leg trouser in earthy tones. Versatile enough for the streets, the studio, or the stage.

name: Artsy Block Tee
description: Oversized drop-shoulder tee with bold colour-block print. 100% cotton. Designed to be worn tucked or loose.

name: Drama Cargo Pants
description: Low-rise wide-leg cargo in washed cotton. Six pockets, adjustable waist, and enough room for big energy.

name: Pink Noise Dress
description: Midi-length slip dress in dusty rose with asymmetric hem. Adjustable straps, side slit, and zero compromises.

name: Jaipur Street Jacket
description: Lightweight bomber with embroidered back panel. Inspired by the colours of Jaipur markets. Each piece is subtly unique.
